title: Succubus excess healing damages target

card.rawText: This creature heals for 1/2 the Atk damage it inflicts. Any excess healing above its max HP is also dealt to the target as damage.

effect.value: This creature heals for 1/2 the Atk damage it inflicts. Any excess healing above its max HP is also dealt to the target as damage.

plan.title: Succubus excess healing damages target
plan.summary: Run Succubus at max HP and verify excess lifesteal healing converts to extra target damage.

notes: Read text first: This creature heals for 1/2 the Atk damage it inflicts. Any excess healing above its max HP is also dealt to the target as damage.

steps: Start battle with Succubus at full HP.
Verify target receives excess healing as damage.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run Succubus at max HP and verify excess lifesteal healing converts to extra target damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
